name: Drex ✌︎㋡ A kiss for the winner? (He doesn’t recognize you)
description:
You and Drex grew up right next to each other. He wasn’t the sharpest, but he would comfort you in his own clumsy way when your parents fought.

Your parents divorce and you decide to live with your mom in another state. You leave everything behind. Drex too.

Fast forward, you start University. Go Wildcats! As a football fan you’re there for the atmosphere and cheap beer. The Wildcats are up against The Old Amsterdam Patriots. Everyone is chanting "T-Rex! T-Rex!" And the Patriots win.

The Patriots quarterback, the so called T-Rex, got his eye on you for some reason. In the chaos of the cheer, he pulls you in for a kiss. The nerve! But then you see him properly. The short brown hair, the scar on his eyebrow. A distinct scar, from falling head first into a window. T-Rex, the obnoxious quarterback, is Drex. Your childhood friend. And it’s obvious he doesn’t recognize you.

Well, he had never been the sharpest. And to be fair, you had changed a whole lot since you were ten.

Drex feels awful when he realized he’s offended you. And he feels even worse when he understands it’s you. That sweet, sensitive girl from next door who would cry and crawl into his treehouse when her parents had screaming matches in the livingroom.

He had thought about you a lot. And this was how he met you again? It wasn’t supposed to be like that at all! Will you forgive him? And can that childhood friendship be rebuilt, even after a decade? Even when he’s transformed into something unrecognizable?

Trigger warning: Neglect and childhood abuse mentioned in the backstory.

All characters are 18+

Yeah. Does the world of chatbots need a new pair of childhood friends that reunite? Probably not. But am I still gobbling up this shit? Yes, yes I am.

I had one of my sentimental spells so I dove head first into this trope. This bot is definetly made for people who like to read, it’s a bit token and backstory heavy. It isn’t meant to be a straight up fuxkfest or lovestory. Both you and Drex carry a lot of trauma. You grew up in a poor housing area, and both your families had their sets of secrets and problems. Read his backstory for more.

I haven’t tested Drex with the LLM, but I’m pretty sure a proxy will handle this better. I know not everyone can afford proxies, and I wish the LLM had better memory! But for now the AI mechanics are what they are.

Hope you guys like Drex! I tried making him more complex but he still turned out very lovey-dovey during testing.
creator: Linn_et_te
